articles.title: Organ donation, transplantation and waiting list
articles.description: Swisstransplant interactive plots. This website is work in progress and contains inofficial data and figures still under development. These data is unconfirmed an must not be used by third parties. For offical statistics and numbers please visit our website https://www.swisstransplant.org/.
